input.background: Suppose a population has 26 members identified with the letters A through Z.
input.question: Assume person A gets selected on an initial draw, you replace person A into the sampling frame, and then take a second random draw. What is the probability of drawing person A on the second draw?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

population.description: The set of all members in the population, identified by letters A through Z.

initial_draw.description: The person selected in the initial draw.

second_draw_probability.description: The probability of drawing person A on the second draw.
